ui_response.ui_state: Gamma showed '생성' page with prompt '한글날'. Outline displayed '1' (empty placeholder) with no content generated. No error dialog, toast, or warning message visible to user.

network_analysis.response_body_note: DevTools could not load response data — likely CORS restriction on cross-origin 403 from ai.api.gamma.app

console_analysis.key_error: error generating outline: Unable to complete request
console_analysis.interpretation: Gamma frontend catches the 403 error and logs it, but does not surface it to the user as a visible dialog or toast

gamma_specific.interaction_model: NOT bubble chat — user enters topic, Gamma generates outline then slides
gamma_specific.note: Gamma is fundamentally different from chat-based AI services. Warning delivery must account for its presentation generation workflow, not chat bubble injection.

diagnosis.pattern: 403 Forbidden blocks the generation SSE endpoint. Gamma catches the error internally ('error generating outline: Unable to complete request') but shows no user-facing error message — just an empty outline placeholder.
diagnosis.comparison_with_build5: Build #5 returned 200 (worse — no error signal). Build #6 returns 403 (better — clear error signal), but Gamma still doesn't show user-facing warning.
action_needed: 403 is correctly intercepted but Gamma swallows the error silently
Consider returning 200 with SSE-formatted warning data that Gamma would render as outline content
Alternative: Return 200 with event-stream containing a single error event Gamma would display
Gamma expects Accept: text/event-stream — SSE-based warning delivery may work better than HTTP error codes
